channel.title: sd-scripts Tutorials on Cringe Live
channel.description: Recent content in sd-scripts Tutorials on Cringe Live

item.title: How do the Captions Get Processed?
item.description: How do the Captions Get Processed? # The process_caption method is a comprehensive function designed to process captions with a high degree of customization based on the settings defined in a BaseSubset object. Let’s break down the technical details and mathematical aspects of this method. Caption Prefix and Suffix # The method begins by checking if there are any prefixes or suffixes defined in the subset object. If present, these are added to the beginning and end of the caption, respectively.
